findings.evidence: grep hits: `OrbitRelQuotient.lean:344: lemma normalizerQuotientOrbitRelQuotient_smul_eq_smul_iff` and `NormalizerQuotientFiberAction.lean:183: lemma normalizerQuotient_smul_subgroupFiberOrbit_eq_smul_iff`; Mathlib marks the analogous torsor cancellation iff as simp at `Mathlib/Algebra/Torsor/Defs.lean:122`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to the iff lemma(s), or at least to the deck-facing wrapper if avoiding duplicate simp lemmas is preferred.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientOrbitRelQuotient_smul_eq_smul_iff` is the characteristic normal form for equality of two descended quotient actions, but it is not marked `@[simp]`; the deck wrapper at `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/NormalizerQuotientFiberAction.lean:183` has the same issue.

summary: The exposed freeness criteria are missing the automation annotation expected for cancellation normal forms, so downstream users still have to name the new API manually in routine equality goals.
